title: Original Build Guide Modernization Execution
objective: Refresh the original Olares build-guide stack so it aligns with whole-project Olares governance, a Max-plan-first AI operating model, and the currently admitted minimal MCP boundary.
execution_summary: Packet 091 refreshes the original Olares build guide, its direct derivatives, and the visual architecture reference so Olares remains the governing execution environment, GitHub stays canonical, the laptop stays client-only, Claude Code plus Codex monthly-plan use becomes the primary AI operating posture, Ollama/local models become optional, and MCP scope stays bounded to `apex-fs`, `apex-db`, and `apex-jobs`.

It does not install services, widen the admitted AI boundary, mutate runtime, change package or lockfile state, modify the old host clone, or perform publication/host resync.
next_packet_candidate: Packet 092 authority publication and host-mirror resync gate for the build-guide modernization tranche.
sql_permission_note: This execution packet authorizes no database writes, no runtime or service mutation, no package or lockfile mutation, no installs, no AI-services expansion beyond the admitted trio, no remote rewrite, no rollback or force/reset/clean, and no old-clone mutation.
